penalties.description: Task was not completed within the 300-second time limit. Only partial transfers were completed.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion status. Claude reported incomplete task with only 4/6 rings transferred, while GPT reported full completion in 78.5 seconds. Given the fundamental nature of this disagreement and the automatic-zero condition for incomplete tasks in the rubric, the conservative approach is to treat this as incomplete, resulting in zero score.

disagreements.rationale: Fundamental disagreement on task completion. Claude's incomplete assessment takes precedence due to automatic-zero rubric condition.
Incomplete task penalty supersedes lost object penalty in the rubric hierarchy.
Consistent with incomplete task assessment - return phases would not be present if task was incomplete.
Incomplete task results in automatic zero score per rubric requirements.
